'''dhayupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thamuria|thamuria]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thamuria|thamuria]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhayupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæyipith|dhæyipith]] || [[word:dhæyipij|dhæyipij]] || [[word:dhæyipish|dhæyipish]] || [[word:dhæyipi|dhæyipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayuyuputh|dhayuyuputh]] || [[word:dhayuyupuj|dhayuyupuj]] || [[word:dhayuyupush|dhayuyupush]] || [[word:dhayuyupu|dhayuyupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayuputh|dhayuputh]] || [[word:dhayupuj|dhayupuj]] || [[word:dhayupush|dhayupush]] || [[word:dhayupu|dhayupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayufputh|dhayufputh]] || [[word:dhayufpuj|dhayufpuj]] || [[word:dhayufpush|dhayufpush]] || [[word:dhayufpuf|dhayufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhayuputhu|dhayuputhu]] || [[word:dhayupuju|dhayupuju]] || [[word:dhayupushu|dhayupushu]] || [[word:dhayupuku|dhayupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhayuputh|dhayuputh]] || [[word:dhayupuj|dhayupuj]] || [[word:dhayupush|dhayupush]] || [[word:dhayupu|dhayupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhayuputhul|dhayuputhul]] || [[word:dhayupujul|dhayupujul]] || [[word:dhayupushul|dhayupushul]] || [[word:dhayupukul|dhayupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhayuputhuthu|dhayuputhuthu]] || [[word:dhayupujuju|dhayupujuju]] || [[word:dhayupushushu|dhayupushushu]] || [[word:dhayupuku|dhayupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhayuputhun|dhayuputhun]] || [[word:dhayupujun|dhayupujun]] || [[word:dhayupushun|dhayupushun]] || [[word:dhayupukun|dhayupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhayuputhuoro|dhayuputhuoro]] || [[word:dhayupujuoro|dhayupujuoro]] || [[word:dhayupushuoro|dhayupushuoro]] || [[word:dhayupukuoro|dhayupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
